description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures arranged on a rectangular stone base. The central figure stands upright, draped in cloth, with one arm raised and the other holding a towel or cloth over their head. Flanking the central figure are two seated figures, each in a contemplative or resting pose, with one holding an object resembling a jug or vessel. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed attention to the folds of their garments and the naturalistic posture of their bodies. The stone base is solid and rectangular, with a slightly weathered appearance and a patch of green moss or grass at its base. The entire composition suggests a scene of bathing or rest, possibly inspired by mythological or allegorical themes.
description: A classical stone sculpture of three human figures, with one standing and two seated, arranged on a rectangular base. The figures are detailed and naturalistic, with draped garments and contemplative poses.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three figures: the central standing figure with raised arm, and two seated figures on either side, one holding a jug.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the back of the left seated figure and the profile of the central standing figure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of all three figures, with the drapery and hair details visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the right seated figure and the profile of the central standing figure.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in a classical or allegorical scene
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is situated outdoors, as indicated by the presence of moss or grass around the stone base.
